title: Update to Checklist
excerpt: I have a form that is feeding information from Jotform to monday.com. One of the questions is a multiple choice question. What would be the best way to input this into monday.com? If I do is as an update, only the select…

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a form that is feeding information from Jotform to monday.com. One of the questions is a multiple choice question. What would be the best way to input this into monday.com? If I do is as an update, only the selected choices will come up. What would be ideal is if the entire question carries over to monday update as a checklist, and the selected choices are marked off.
Any suggestions (even via automations)?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Soroh!

Have you considered using the Dropdown Column to show the multiple choice options?

If this won’t work, perhaps you can also take a look at creating the form within monday.com.

Let me know your thoughts and we can go from there!

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dropdown column doesn’t work.

I want to use Jotform because I want to have the ability to hide questions, which workforms does not provide.
